message:
chore: add agent ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Multi-agent coding environments create temporary marker files that should
never be committed. These patterns cover common ephemeral files observed
across sessions:

- .codex_dummy, dummy, noop - Codex agent probe files
- _, ignore - Generic agent placeholder files
- mcp_agent_mail, .mcp_agent_mail_stub - MCP Agent Mail coordination stubs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,3 +123,14 @@ a.out
 
 # Screenshots (browser snipping tool artifacts)
 Snipping_*.png
+
+# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Agent ephemeral files (created by AI coding agents, not meant for commits)
+# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
+.codex_dummy
+dummy
+noop
+_
+ignore
+mcp_agent_mail
+.mcp_agent_mail_stub
